---
title: "Scratch"
format: html
---

# Calculations

```{R}
#| echo: false
library(testthat)
shift <- function(A, k = 1) {
  n <- if (is.matrix(A)) nrow(A) else length(A)
  k <- (-k) %% n
  if (k == 0) return(A)
  if (is.matrix(A)) {
    A[c((k + 1):n, 1:k), , drop = FALSE]
  } else {
    A[c((k + 1):n, 1:k)]
  }
}
```

### Setup
A symmetric circulant matrix with $n=6$ has independent components $a_0, a_1, a_2, a_3$ with the symmetry condition $a_k = a_{n-k}$.

### Constraints
**1. Block diagonal (L=3):** Sum of the 3×3 top-left block equals zero:
$$3a_0 + 4a_1 + 2a_2 = 0$$

**2. Global sum:** All elements of $A$ sum to zero:
$$a_0 + 2a_1 + 2a_2 + a_3 = 0$$

### Solution Space
Solving the two constraints gives a 2-dimensional solution space parameterized by $a_0$ and $a_1$:
$$a_2 = -\frac{3a_0 + 4a_1}{2}, \qquad a_3 = 2a_0 + 2a_1$$

### Minimum Norm Solution
Fixing $a_0 = 1$ and minimizing the Frobenius norm over $a_1$ gives $a_1 = -\frac{19}{20}$, and therefore:

$$a_0 = 20, \quad a_1 = -19, \quad a_2 = 8, \quad a_3 = 2$$

### Matrix
$$A = \begin{pmatrix} 20 & -19 & 8 & 2 & 8 & -19 \\ -19 & 20 & -19 & 8 & 2 & 8 \\ 8 & -19 & 20 & -19 & 8 & 2 \\ 2 & 8 & -19 & 20 & -19 & 8 \\ 8 & 2 & 8 & -19 & 20 & -19 \\ -19 & 8 & 2 & 8 & -19 & 20 \end{pmatrix}$$

# Notes
- $n=8, L=3$ comes out to the same solution as $n=8, L=2$.

```{R}
#| echo: false
make_coefs <- function(coefs, n) {
  # coefs = c(a0, a1, a2, ...) — the unique leading values
  L <- length(coefs)
  c(
    coefs, 
    rep(0, n - 2 * (L - 1) - 1), 
    rev(coefs[-1])
  ) / coefs[1]
}

ece <- function(A, x) drop(t(x) %*% A %*% x)

# Standard circulant test suite
test_suite <- function(A, n, L) {
  X_base <- matrix(rep(0, n), ncol = 1); X_base[1:L] <- 1

  testthat::test_that("Correct Length", {
    expect_equal(nrow(A), n)
  })

  testthat::test_that("Correct Output", {
    expect_equal(ece(A, shift(X_base, k = 0)), 0)
    expect_equal(ece(A, shift(X_base, k = 2)), 0)
    expect_equal(ece(A, shift(X_base, k = 3)), 0)

    X <- matrix(rep(0, n), ncol = 1); X[1:(L+1)] <- 1
    expect_equal(ece(A, X), 0)

    X <- matrix(rep(1, n), ncol = 1)
    expect_equal(ece(A, X), 0)
  })
}
```

```{R}

# n=8, L=3
a <- make_coefs(c(1, -1, 1/2, 0), n = 8)
A <- toeplitz(a)
test_suite(A, n = 8, L = 3)

# n=10, L=4
a <- make_coefs(c(1, -1, 1/2), n = 10)
A <- toeplitz(a)
test_suite(A, n = 10, L = 4)

# n=10, L=5
a <- make_coefs(c(1, -1, 1/2), n = 10)
A <- toeplitz(a)
test_suite(A, n = 10, L = 5)
```

## Optimization Problem
$$
\begin{aligned}
& \min_a \|A\|_F \\ 
& s.t. \|A_L\|_1 = 0, \\
& \qquad \|A_n\|_1 = 0
\end{aligned}
$$
It turns out that 
$$
\|A_L\|_1 = L a_0 + \sum_{i=1}^L 2(L-i)a_i. 
$$


--- 
```{R}
library(MASS)

# ---- Build Constraint Matrix C ----
make_constraint_matrix <- function(n, L) {
  half <- floor(n/2)
  ms <- L:half
  
  # Submatrix constraints: coefficients are 2*(l - k) for k = 0, ..., l
  # where k=0 gives l (not 2*l) so we adjust
  submatrix_row <- function(l) {
    coeffs <- pmax(2 * (l - 0:half), 0)  # 2*(l-k), clipped at 0
    coeffs[1] <- l                         # a0 gets l, not 2*l
    coeffs
  }
  
  # Global sum constraint: 1, 2, 2, ..., 2, 1
  global_row <- c(1, rep(2, half - 1), 1)
  
  # Stack rows
  C <- rbind(
    do.call(rbind, lapply(ms, submatrix_row)),
    global_row
  )
  
  rownames(C) <- c(paste0("m=", ms), "m=n")
  colnames(C) <- paste0("a", 0:half)
  C
}


# ---- Null Space ----
null_space <- function(C, tol=1e-10) {
  svd_C <- svd(C, nv = ncol(C))
  rank <- sum(svd_C$d > tol)
  svd_C$v[, (rank + 1):ncol(C), drop = FALSE]
}
```

```{R}

minimize_frobenius <- function(n, L) {
  half <- floor(n / 2)
  V    <- null_space(make_constraint_matrix(n, L))

  w <- c(1, rep(2, half - 1), 1)
  Q <- t(V) %*% diag(w) %*% V

  cvec       <- V[1, ]                                      # a0 = 1 constraint
  Qinv       <- solve(Q)
  alpha_star <- Qinv %*% cvec / drop(t(cvec) %*% Qinv %*% cvec)

  a_half <- drop(V %*% alpha_star)
  c(a_half, rev(a_half[-c(1, half + 1)]))
}

a <- minimize_frobenius(n = 6, L = 3)
A <- toeplitz(a)
```


--- 

```{R}
L <- 2
T1 <- 1
K <- matrix(
  c(
    1, 1, 
    1, 2
  ), ncol=2, nrow=2, byrow=TRUE
)
R <- matrix(1:L * T1)
solve(t(K) %*% K) %*% t(K) %*% R

devtools::load_all("~/Documents/Research/Code/ECE")
config <- scenario(2)
X <- generate_data(config)

a_half <- c(2, -1, 0)
a <- c(a_half, rev(a_half[-c(1, floor(n / 2) + 1)]))
A <- toeplitz(a)
t(X) %*% A %*% X
```


```{R}
a <- c(1, -1, 1/2, rep(0, n - 5), 1/2, -1)
A <- circ(a) / n

a <- ece_min_norm(n=10, L=2) |> round(3)
a <- ece_min_norm(n=10, L=3) |> round(3)
a <- ece_min_norm(n=10, L=4) |> round(3)
a <- ece_min_norm(n=10, L=5) |> round(3)

A <- circ(a) / n

```

```{R}
# Regression Form
n <- 100
L <- 6
K <- matrix(c(rep(1, L), 1:L), ncol=2)
H <- solve(t(K) %*% K) %*% t(K) / (2 * n)

# Find Corresponding A
Ak <- map(1:L, ~lag_mat(n, k=.x))
A <- map2(H[1,], Ak, ~ .x * .y) |> reduce(`+`)

a_matrix <- ece_min_norm(n=n, L=L) |> round(3)
a_regress <- (A * n)[1,] |> round(3)

# Test
identical(a_matrix, a_regress)

# Calculate Real Values
config <- scenario(2)
X <- generate_data(config)
map_dbl(1:L, ~lag_diff(X[,1], X[,2], k=.x))
```

```{R}

```
